§ 01Commission Confirmed

Dear {{brokerName}},

The employee ownership transition of {{companyName}} closed today. This letter confirms your broker commission details and wire timing.

Confirmed
Commission Wire Scheduled
{{commissionAmount}}
{{commissionRate}}
{{wireDate}}
ACH / Wire Transfer
§ 02Wire Details

Your commission will be wired to the account on file. Forhemit does not adjust, share, defer, or appear as a line item affecting broker commission. The commission is paid by the operating company as part of the closing settlement.

Confirmation: Forhemit confirms that no portion of the broker commission was adjusted, reduced, or deferred as a result of Forhemit's engagement or fee structure. The commission amount represents the full agreed-upon compensation per the listing agreement between the broker and the seller.
§ 03Post-Close Relationship

We appreciate your partnership throughout this transaction. Forhemit values its broker relationships and looks forward to working together on future opportunities.

If you have questions about the commission wire or any other closing matter, please contact:

deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}
—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
